title: Fix admin Unverified Origin login error, press kit text content display, and password dialog

requirements.text: Fix the 'Unverified origin' error on the /admin route when attempting Internet Identity login in the deployed environment. The Internet Identity provider is rejecting the request origin, likely because the derivationOrigin or the II provider URL is misconfigured for the deployed canister. Audit the InternetIdentityProvider configuration in main.tsx and/or AdminDashboard.tsx — ensure the correct II URL (https://identity.ic0.app) and derivationOrigin (the deployed frontend canister URL, e.g. https://<canister-id>.icp0.io) are set. The login flow must complete successfully without an 'Unverified origin' error in the deployed environment.

quotes: When I try to login on the admin I get /admin I get Unverified origin It seems like the request could not be processed.

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin and clicking the Internet Identity login button no longer produces an 'Unverified origin' error
The Internet Identity flow completes and the authenticated principal is returned to the admin page
The derivationOrigin passed to the II provider matches the deployed frontend canister URL
The II provider URL is set to https://identity.ic0.app for production

requirements.text: Fix the press kit page so that all CMS text content (about text, features list, game details, social links) is correctly fetched from the backend and rendered in the PressKitPage. Images are loading correctly but text fields are not visible. Investigate the useQueries hooks that fetch text-based content fields — confirm the anonymous actor is properly initialized for public reads, that query keys are correct, that the backend returns the stored text values, and that PressKitPage correctly passes data to its child components. Ensure all text sections render their saved CMS values.

quotes: Images are loading fine, but I can't see my text on the press kit. Fix the issue between the CMS and the text content.

acceptanceCriteria: The About text section displays the text saved via the CMS
The Features list section displays the features saved via the CMS
The Game Details section displays the details saved via the CMS
Social links saved in the CMS are rendered in the Social Media section
Text content is fetched using the anonymous actor (no authentication required for public reads)
React Query hooks for text fields return data without errors in the deployed environment

requirements.text: Fix the password gate dialog (PasswordGateModal) on the press kit page — it is no longer functioning after recent changes. Investigate the verifyPassword backend call inside PasswordGateModal, confirm the anonymous actor is available and correctly invoked, that sessionStorage verification state is set on success, and that the modal dismisses correctly. The password gate must block access to the press kit when password protection is enabled, accept a correct password, and close on successful verification.

quotes: the password dialog doesn't work now

acceptanceCriteria: The PasswordGateModal renders and is interactable when password protection is enabled
Submitting the correct password calls the backend verifyPassword method without error
On successful verification, sessionStorage is updated and the modal closes
On incorrect password, an inline error message is displayed
The modal does not crash or silently fail when the actor is in anonymous/unauthenticated context

constraints: Do not modify PressKitPage layout, visual design, or section ordering
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, or components/ui
Do not change any working functionality — only fix the three identified issues
Do not alter the backend data schema or stored content
nonGoals: Changing the press kit page layout or visual style
Modifying the video thumbnail or screenshot gallery
